title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
